examples.title: Bidirectional RNN
examples.description: A pseudocode implementation of a Bidirectional RNN
examples.code:
FORWARD_RNN = RNN(INPUT_SEQUENCE)
BACKWARD_RNN = RNN(REVERSE(INPUT_SEQUENCE))
OUTPUT = CONCAT(FORWARD_RNN, BACKWARD_RNN)
examples.explanation: This pseudocode implements a Bidirectional RNN by processing the input sequence in both the forward and backward directions.

examples.title: Bidirectional RNN
examples.description: A Python implementation of a Bidirectional RNN using the Keras library
examples.code:
from keras.layers import Bidirectional, LSTM
from keras.models import Sequential

model = Sequential()
model.add(Bidirectional(LSTM(64, return_sequences=True), input_shape=(10, 1)))
examples.explanation: This Python code implements a Bidirectional RNN using the Keras library.
